checks.name: api

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 414 divs with only 19 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 71/131 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found

Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 13 headings, well-structured

Good link accessibility: 111/130 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~41,036 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 19 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~4,226 tokens (10% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.05–$0.62 per load ($0.26–$3.08 for a 5-page session)
106 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, complementary, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 170 images have alt attributes (21 descriptive, 149 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
37 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 100ms
Compact payload: 23KB
No redirects — direct access
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
